---
title: "Protein x AD biomarker correlation"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(janitor)
library(lmerTest)
library(broom.mixed)
library(pheatmap)
ROOT <- normalizePath("..")
DATA_DIR <- file.path(ROOT, "data")
OUT_BASE <- file.path(ROOT, "outputs")
BIOMARKER_DIR <- file.path(ROOT, "biomarker_data")
Sys.setenv(VROOM_CONNECTION_SIZE = 2^24)
PRIVATE_DIR <- file.path(ROOT, "private")
required_setting <- function(name) {
  value <- Sys.getenv(name, unset = "")
  if (!nzchar(value)) {
    stop("Set ", name, " to the matching local input value.")
  }
  value
}
read_private_ids <- function(env_name, default_file) {
  value <- Sys.getenv(env_name, unset = "")
  path <- if (nzchar(value)) value else default_file
  if (!file.exists(path)) return(character())
  ids <- trimws(readLines(path, warn = FALSE))
  ids[nzchar(ids)]
}
read_private_fixes <- function(env_name, default_file) {
  value <- Sys.getenv(env_name, unset = "")
  path <- if (nzchar(value)) value else default_file
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    return(tibble(source = character(), id = character(),
                  match_draw_date = as.Date(character()),
                  only_if_visit_missing = logical(),
                  visit_n = integer(), draw_date = as.Date(character())))
  }
  fixes <- read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  if (!"match_draw_date" %in% names(fixes) && "draw_date" %in% names(fixes)) {
    fixes <- rename(fixes, match_draw_date = draw_date)
  }
  if (!"only_if_visit_missing" %in% names(fixes)) {
    fixes$only_if_visit_missing <- FALSE
  }
  if (!"draw_date" %in% names(fixes)) {
    fixes$draw_date <- NA_character_
  }
  fixes %>%
    transmute(
      source = as.character(source),
      id = as.character(id),
      match_draw_date = as.Date(match_draw_date),
      only_if_visit_missing = as.logical(only_if_visit_missing),
      visit_n = as.integer(visit_n),
      draw_date = as.Date(draw_date)
    )
}
apply_private_fixes <- function(df, fixes, source_name) {
  fixes <- fixes %>% filter(source == source_name)
  if (nrow(fixes) == 0L) return(df)
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(fixes))) {
    idx <- df$biomarker_subject_id == fixes$id[i]
    if (!is.na(fixes$match_draw_date[i])) {
      idx <- idx & df$draw_date == fixes$match_draw_date[i]
    }
    if (isTRUE(fixes$only_if_visit_missing[i])) {
      idx <- idx & is.na(df$visit_n)
    }
    idx[is.na(idx)] <- FALSE
    if (!is.na(fixes$visit_n[i])) {
      df$visit_n[idx] <- fixes$visit_n[i]
    }
    if (!is.na(fixes$draw_date[i])) {
      df$draw_date[idx] <- fixes$draw_date[i]
    }
  }
  df
}
SUBJECT_ID_FIELD <- required_setting("SUBJECT_ID_FIELD")
BIOMARKER_ID_FIELD <- required_setting("BIOMARKER_ID_FIELD")
BIOMARKER_STUDY_FILTER <- Sys.getenv("BIOMARKER_STUDY_FILTER", unset = "")
EXPRESSION_FILE <- required_setting("CORRELATION_EXPRESSION_FILE")
SAMPLE_METADATA_FILE <- required_setting("CORRELATION_SAMPLE_METADATA_FILE")
DEMOGRAPHICS_FILE <- required_setting("CORRELATION_DEMOGRAPHICS_FILE")
PROTEIN_METADATA_FILE <- required_setting("CORRELATION_PROTEIN_METADATA_FILE")
BIOMARKER_TAU181_FILE <- required_setting("CORRELATION_TAU181_FILE")
BIOMARKER_TAU217_FILE <- required_setting("CORRELATION_TAU217_FILE")
EXCLUDE_SUBJECT_IDS <- read_private_ids(
  "EXCLUDE_SUBJECT_IDS_FILE",
  file.path(PRIVATE_DIR, "exclude_subject_ids.txt")
)
BIOMARKER_VISIT_FIXES <- read_private_fixes(
  "CORRELATION_BIOMARKER_VISIT_FIXES",
  file.path(PRIVATE_DIR, "correlation_biomarker_visit_fixes.csv")
)
MIN_BASELINE_AGE <- 55
AGE_TERMS <- c("age_baseline", "age_delta")
RUN_GROUP_SENSITIVITY <- TRUE
RUN_AB_RATIO_RAW_SENSITIVITY <- TRUE
BIO <- c("PlasmaPTau181", "PlasmaAB142P", "PlasmaAB140P", "PlasmaABRatio",
         "PTau217", "GFAP", "NfL")
```

```{r load-raw, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
expr_raw <- read_csv(
  file.path(DATA_DIR, EXPRESSION_FILE),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

smeta <- read_csv(
  file.path(DATA_DIR, SAMPLE_METADATA_FILE),
  show_col_types = FALSE, guess_max = 5000, name_repair = "unique"
)
sid_cols <- grep("^SampleId", names(smeta), value = TRUE)
if (length(sid_cols) > 1) {
  stopifnot(identical(as.character(smeta[[sid_cols[1]]]),
                      as.character(smeta[[sid_cols[2]]])))
  smeta[[sid_cols[2]]] <- NULL
  names(smeta)[names(smeta) == sid_cols[1]] <- "SampleId"
}

demo <- read_excel(file.path(DATA_DIR, DEMOGRAPHICS_FILE))
protein_dict <- read_csv(
  file.path(DATA_DIR, PROTEIN_METADATA_FILE),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)
tau181_raw <- read_excel(
  file.path(BIOMARKER_DIR, BIOMARKER_TAU181_FILE),
  sheet = "Combined_Data"
)
if (nzchar(BIOMARKER_STUDY_FILTER) && "Study" %in% names(tau181_raw)) {
  tau181_raw <- tau181_raw %>% filter(Study == BIOMARKER_STUDY_FILTER)
}
tau217_raw <- read_excel(
  file.path(BIOMARKER_DIR, BIOMARKER_TAU217_FILE)
)

expr_raw$SampleId <- as.character(expr_raw$SampleId)
smeta$SampleId    <- as.character(smeta$SampleId)
demo$SampleId     <- as.character(demo$SampleId)
```

```{r expr-qc}
soma_cols <- grep("^SL[0-9]", names(expr_raw), value = TRUE)
stopifnot(length(soma_cols) >= 7000)
qc_pass_ids     <- smeta$SampleId[smeta$RowCheck == "PASS"]
sample_only_ids <- smeta$SampleId[smeta$SampleType == "Sample"]
keep_ids        <- intersect(qc_pass_ids, sample_only_ids)

expr <- expr_raw %>% filter(SampleId %in% keep_ids)
soma_mat_raw <- as.matrix(expr[, soma_cols])
rownames(soma_mat_raw) <- expr$SampleId
stopifnot(all(!is.na(soma_mat_raw)), all(soma_mat_raw > 0))

log2_long   <- log2(soma_mat_raw)
log2_byid   <- rowsum(log2_long, group = rownames(log2_long), reorder = TRUE)
counts_byid <- as.numeric(table(rownames(log2_long))[rownames(log2_byid)])
log2_avg    <- log2_byid / counts_byid
expr_long <- as_tibble(log2_avg, rownames = "SampleId")
protein_label_map <- protein_dict %>%
  distinct(SomaKey, Target, EntrezGeneSymbol) %>%
  mutate(Target = if_else(is.na(Target) | Target == "", SomaKey, Target))
```

```{r covar}
demo_u <- demo %>%
  filter(SampleId %in% expr_long$SampleId) %>%
  distinct(SampleId, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(source_subject_id = as.character(.data[[SUBJECT_ID_FIELD]]),
         Visit_int   = as.integer(Visit))

covar <- demo_u %>%
  filter(!(source_subject_id %in% EXCLUDE_SUBJECT_IDS)) %>%
  mutate(
    Sex          = factor(Sex),
    SubjectID    = factor(paste0("S", match(source_subject_id,
                                            unique(source_subject_id)))),
    age_at_visit = as.numeric(Age_years),
    group_combined = case_when(
      Diagnosis_group == "HC"                 ~ "HC",
      Diagnosis_group %in% c("MCI", "AD")     ~ "AD_spectrum",
      Diagnosis_group == "PD"                 ~ "PD",
      Diagnosis_group %in% c("MCI-PD", "LBD") ~ "LB_spectrum",
      TRUE                                     ~ NA_character_
    ),
    group_combined = factor(group_combined,
                            levels = c("HC","AD_spectrum","PD","LB_spectrum")),
    group_individual = case_when(
      Diagnosis_group %in% c("HC","MCI","AD","PD","LBD") ~ Diagnosis_group,
      Diagnosis_group == "MCI-PD"                          ~ "MCI_PD",
      TRUE                                                  ~ NA_character_
    ),
    group_individual = factor(group_individual,
                              levels = c("HC","MCI","AD","PD","MCI_PD","LBD"))
  ) %>%
  select(-source_subject_id) %>%
  filter(!is.na(group_individual), !is.na(age_at_visit), !is.na(Sex))
covar <- covar %>%
  group_by(SubjectID) %>%
  mutate(
    age_baseline = min(age_at_visit, na.rm = TRUE),
    age_delta    = age_at_visit - age_baseline
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
if (!is.na(MIN_BASELINE_AGE)) {
  base_age <- covar %>% distinct(SubjectID, baseline_age = age_baseline)
  keep_subj <- base_age$SubjectID[base_age$baseline_age >= MIN_BASELINE_AGE]
  covar <- covar %>% filter(SubjectID %in% keep_subj)
}
covar$group_individual <- droplevels(covar$group_individual)
covar$group_combined   <- droplevels(covar$group_combined)
covar$Sex              <- droplevels(covar$Sex)
print(covar %>% count(group_individual))
print(covar %>% count(group_combined))
```

```{r bio-harmonize}
tau217 <- tau217_raw %>%
  mutate(
    biomarker_subject_id = as.character(.data[[BIOMARKER_ID_FIELD]]),
    visit_n     = case_when(
      Year == "Y" ~ 1L,
      str_detect(Year, "^Y\\d+$") ~ as.integer(str_remove(Year, "^Y")),
      TRUE        ~ NA_integer_
    ),
    draw_date   = as.Date(Blood_Draw_Date)
  ) %>%
  apply_private_fixes(BIOMARKER_VISIT_FIXES, "tau217") %>%
  filter(!is.na(biomarker_subject_id), !is.na(visit_n)) %>%
  arrange(biomarker_subject_id, visit_n, is.na(draw_date), draw_date) %>%
  group_by(biomarker_subject_id, visit_n) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(biomarker_subject_id, visit_n, PTau217, GFAP, NfL)
tau181 <- tau181_raw %>%
  mutate(
    Sample_ID   = str_squish(Sample_ID),
    biomarker_subject_id = str_extract(Sample_ID, "^\\d+"),
    visit_n     = case_when(
      str_detect(Sample_ID, "\\bY\\d+\\b") ~ as.integer(str_extract(Sample_ID, "(?<=\\bY)\\d+")),
      str_detect(Sample_ID, "\\bY\\b")     ~ 1L,
      TRUE                                  ~ NA_integer_
    ),
    draw_date   = lubridate::mdy(str_extract(Sample_ID, "\\d{1,2}/\\d{1,2}/\\d{2,4}"))
  ) %>%
  apply_private_fixes(BIOMARKER_VISIT_FIXES, "tau181") %>%
  filter(!is.na(biomarker_subject_id), !is.na(visit_n)) %>%
  arrange(biomarker_subject_id, visit_n, is.na(draw_date), draw_date) %>%
  group_by(biomarker_subject_id, visit_n) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(biomarker_subject_id, visit_n, PlasmaPTau181, PlasmaAB142P, PlasmaAB140P, PlasmaABRatio)

bio_long <- full_join(tau181, tau217, by = c("biomarker_subject_id", "visit_n"))
demo_bridge <- demo %>%
  distinct(
    SampleId,
    biomarker_subject_id = as.character(.data[[BIOMARKER_ID_FIELD]]),
    Visit = as.integer(Visit)
  )

bio_with_sample <- bio_long %>%
  inner_join(demo_bridge,
             by = c("biomarker_subject_id" = "biomarker_subject_id",
                    "visit_n" = "Visit")) %>%
  rename(visit_n_int = visit_n)
message(sprintf("Biomarker rows: %d / Bridged to demo: %d (%.1f%%)",
                nrow(bio_long), nrow(bio_with_sample),
                100 * nrow(bio_with_sample) / max(1L, nrow(bio_long))))
```

```{r assemble}
samp_tbl <- covar %>%
  left_join(bio_with_sample %>% select(SampleId, all_of(BIO)),
            by = "SampleId") %>%
  inner_join(expr_long, by = "SampleId")

stopifnot(nrow(samp_tbl) == nrow(covar))
bio_cov <- tibble(biomarker = BIO,
                  n_with_value = vapply(BIO, function(b) sum(!is.na(samp_tbl[[b]])), 0L))
print(bio_cov)
samp_tbl_bio <- samp_tbl %>% filter(if_any(all_of(BIO), ~ !is.na(.x)))
message(sprintf("Samples with >=1 biomarker value: %d (subjects: %d)",
                nrow(samp_tbl_bio),
                length(unique(samp_tbl_bio$SubjectID))))
```

```{r discovery-helpers}
read_dream_toptable <- function(path, comparison, source_label,
                                sex_label = NA_character_) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) return(tibble())
  readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    transmute(
      SomaKey,
      label          = if_else(is.na(Target) | Target == "", SomaKey, Target),
      logFC, P.Value,
      q_disc         = adj.P.Val,
      comparison     = comparison,
      comparison_key = str_replace_all(comparison, "[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_") %>%
                       str_replace_all("^_|_$", ""),
      source         = source_label,
      sex            = sex_label,
      EntrezGeneSymbol
    )
}
COMBINED_MAP <- list(
  "AD_spectrum vs HC" = "toptable_AD_spectrum_vs_HC.csv",
  "LB_spectrum vs HC" = "toptable_LB_spectrum_vs_HC.csv",
  "PD vs HC"          = "toptable_PD_vs_HC.csv"
)
INDIV_MAP <- list(
  "AD vs HC"     = "toptable_AD_vs_HC.csv",
  "MCI vs HC"    = "toptable_MCI_vs_HC.csv",
  "MCI-PD vs HC" = "toptable_MCI_PD_vs_HC.csv",
  "LBD vs HC"    = "toptable_LBD_vs_HC.csv",
  "PD vs HC"     = "toptable_PD_vs_HC.csv"
)
load_dream_set <- function(base_dir, contrast_map, source_label,
                           sex_label = NA_character_) {
  if (!dir.exists(base_dir)) {
    message("  [skip] missing dir: ", base_dir)
    return(tibble())
  }
  rows <- map_dfr(names(contrast_map), function(comp) {
    p <- file.path(base_dir, contrast_map[[comp]])
    if (!file.exists(p)) {
      message("  [skip] missing toptable: ", p)
      return(tibble())
    }
    read_dream_toptable(p, comparison = comp, source_label = source_label,
                        sex_label = sex_label)
  })
  rows
}
```

```{r discovery-load, message=TRUE}
DREAM_COMB <- file.path(OUT_BASE, "dream_combined_baseAge55")
DREAM_IND  <- file.path(OUT_BASE, "dream_individual_baseAge55")
DREAM_COMB_F <- file.path(OUT_BASE, "dream_combined_baseAge55_sexF")
DREAM_COMB_M <- file.path(OUT_BASE, "dream_combined_baseAge55_sexM")
DREAM_IND_F  <- file.path(OUT_BASE, "dream_individual_baseAge55_sexF")
DREAM_IND_M  <- file.path(OUT_BASE, "dream_individual_baseAge55_sexM")

dream_combined <- load_dream_set(DREAM_COMB, COMBINED_MAP, "combined")
dream_individual <- load_dream_set(DREAM_IND, INDIV_MAP, "individual")
dream_comb_F <- load_dream_set(DREAM_COMB_F, COMBINED_MAP, "combined_sex", "F")
dream_comb_M <- load_dream_set(DREAM_COMB_M, COMBINED_MAP, "combined_sex", "M")
dream_ind_F  <- load_dream_set(DREAM_IND_F,  INDIV_MAP,    "individual_sex", "F")
dream_ind_M  <- load_dream_set(DREAM_IND_M,  INDIV_MAP,    "individual_sex", "M")

if (nrow(dream_ind_M) + nrow(dream_comb_M) == 0L) {
  message(">>> Sex-stratified MALE outputs not present yet. ",
          "Skipping sex_M discovery layer for this run.")
}

dream_all <- bind_rows(dream_combined, dream_individual,
                       dream_comb_F, dream_comb_M,
                       dream_ind_F, dream_ind_M)
message(sprintf("Loaded %d dream toptable rows across %d sources.",
                nrow(dream_all), n_distinct(dream_all$source)))
```

```{r panel-cands}
PANEL_HITS_FDR10 <- file.path(OUT_BASE,
  "dream_individual_baseAge55/panel_subsets/dream_panel_hits_fdr10.csv")

panel_hits <- if (file.exists(PANEL_HITS_FDR10)) {
  readr::read_csv(PANEL_HITS_FDR10, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    transmute(
      panel,
      SomaKey,
      label          = if_else(is.na(Target) | Target == "", SomaKey, Target),
      comparison     = contrast_title,
      comparison_key = str_replace_all(comparison, "[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_") %>%
                       str_replace_all("^_|_$", ""),
      logFC,
      q_disc         = panel_adj.P.Val,
      source         = "panel_individual",
      sex            = NA_character_,
      EntrezGeneSymbol
    )
} else {
  warning("Panel hits FDR10 file missing: ", PANEL_HITS_FDR10)
  tibble()
}

extract_candidates <- function(tbl, alpha_fdr = 0.10) {
  tbl %>%
    filter(!is.na(q_disc), q_disc < alpha_fdr) %>%
    distinct(SomaKey, comparison, source, .keep_all = TRUE)
}
```

```{r run-panel-fn}
fit_one_pair <- function(somakey,
                         biom,
                         df,
                         adjust_for_group = TRUE,
                         age_terms = AGE_TERMS,
                         biomarker_scale = c("log2", "raw")) {
  biomarker_scale <- match.arg(biomarker_scale)
  missing_age <- setdiff(age_terms, names(df))
  if (length(missing_age) > 0L) {
    stop("Missing age adjustment column(s): ", paste(missing_age, collapse = ", "))
  }

  df_cc <- df %>%
    select(SubjectID, all_of(age_terms), Sex, group_individual,
           y = all_of(somakey), x = all_of(biom)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(y), !is.na(x), if_all(all_of(age_terms), ~ !is.na(.x)),
           !is.na(Sex), !is.na(SubjectID))
  if (adjust_for_group) {
    df_cc <- df_cc %>% filter(!is.na(group_individual))
  }
  if (nrow(df_cc) < 10L) return(NULL)

  if (biomarker_scale == "log2") {
    if (any(df_cc$x <= 0, na.rm = TRUE)) return(NULL)
    df_cc <- df_cc %>% mutate(x_model = log2(x))
  } else {
    df_cc <- df_cc %>% mutate(x_model = x)
  }
  if (n_distinct(df_cc$x_model) < 2L) return(NULL)
  df_cc$Sex              <- droplevels(df_cc$Sex)
  df_cc$group_individual <- droplevels(df_cc$group_individual)

  fixed <- c("x_model", age_terms)
  if (nlevels(df_cc$Sex) >= 2)              fixed <- c(fixed, "Sex")
  if (adjust_for_group && nlevels(df_cc$group_individual) >= 2) {
    fixed <- c(fixed, "group_individual")
  }
  has_rep <- any(table(df_cc$SubjectID) > 1)
  fml_txt <- paste("y ~", paste(fixed, collapse = " + "),
                   if (has_rep) "+ (1|SubjectID)" else "")
  fit <- try(if (has_rep) lmer(as.formula(fml_txt), data = df_cc, REML = FALSE)
             else         lm(as.formula(fml_txt), data = df_cc),
             silent = TRUE)
  if (inherits(fit, "try-error")) return(NULL)

  tt <- if (inherits(fit, "lmerMod")) broom.mixed::tidy(fit, effects = "fixed")
        else                          broom::tidy(fit)
  tt %>%
    filter(term == "x_model") %>%
    transmute(SomaKey   = somakey,
              biomarker = biom,
              biomarker_scale = biomarker_scale,
              adjust_for_group = adjust_for_group,
              age_adjustment = paste(age_terms, collapse = " + "),
              beta      = estimate,
              se        = std.error,
              p         = p.value,
              n_obs     = nrow(df_cc),
              n_subj    = n_distinct(df_cc$SubjectID),
              model     = if (has_rep) "lmer" else "lm",
              model_formula = fml_txt)
}

run_panel <- function(cand_tbl,
                      samp_tbl_bio,
                      bio = BIO,
                      protein_label_map,
                      out_tag,
                      alpha_fdr = 0.10,
                      n_top = 8,
                      keep_comparisons = NULL,
                      adjust_for_group = TRUE,
                      age_terms = AGE_TERMS,
                      biomarker_scale = c("log2", "raw"),
                      make_heatmap = TRUE,
                      make_scatter = TRUE) {

  biomarker_scale <- match.arg(biomarker_scale)
  if (!is.null(keep_comparisons)) {
    cand_tbl <- cand_tbl %>%
      filter(comparison %in% setdiff(unique(keep_comparisons), "None"))
    if (nrow(cand_tbl) == 0L)
      stop("After keep_comparisons filter, no discovery candidates remain.")
  }
  present_keys <- intersect(unique(cand_tbl$SomaKey), names(samp_tbl_bio))
  if (length(present_keys) == 0L) {
    stop("None of the discovery SomaKeys are columns in the analytical table.")
  }
  cand_tbl <- cand_tbl %>% filter(SomaKey %in% present_keys)
  pair_grid <- expand_grid(SomaKey = unique(cand_tbl$SomaKey), biomarker = bio)
  res_lmm <- map2_dfr(pair_grid$SomaKey, pair_grid$biomarker,
                      ~ fit_one_pair(.x, .y, samp_tbl_bio,
                                     adjust_for_group = adjust_for_group,
                                     age_terms = age_terms,
                                     biomarker_scale = biomarker_scale))
  if (nrow(res_lmm) == 0L) stop("All LMM fits returned NULL.")
  res_lmm <- res_lmm %>%
    mutate(q = p.adjust(p, method = "BH"))
  lbl <- protein_label_map %>% select(SomaKey, Target, EntrezGeneSymbol)
  res_lmm <- res_lmm %>%
    left_join(lbl, by = "SomaKey") %>%
    mutate(
      ProteinLabel = if_else(is.na(Target) | Target == "", SomaKey, Target),
      colname      = paste0(ProteinLabel, "__", SomaKey)
    )
  if (make_heatmap) {
    beta_mat <- res_lmm %>%
      select(biomarker, colname, beta) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = colname, values_from = beta) %>%
      arrange(match(biomarker, bio)) %>%
      column_to_rownames("biomarker") %>%
      as.matrix()

    q_mat <- res_lmm %>%
      select(biomarker, colname, q) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = colname, values_from = q,
                  values_fn = list(q = mean)) %>%
      arrange(match(biomarker, bio)) %>%
      column_to_rownames("biomarker") %>%
      as.matrix()

    stars  <- ifelse(!is.na(q_mat) & q_mat < alpha_fdr, "*", "")
    mx     <- max(abs(beta_mat), na.rm = TRUE)
    if (!is.finite(mx) || mx == 0) mx <- 1e-6
    bk     <- seq(-mx, mx, length.out = 101)
    pal    <- colorRampPalette(c("#2166AC", "white", "#B2182B"))(100)
    lbl_col <- str_replace(colnames(beta_mat), "__SL\\d+.*$", "")
    col_to_key <- res_lmm %>% distinct(colname, SomaKey)
    ann_src <- cand_tbl %>%
      group_by(SomaKey) %>%
      summarise(
        comp_combined = {
          x <- sort(unique(comparison[source == "combined"]))
          if (length(x) == 0) "None" else paste(x, collapse = " | ")
        },
        comp_individual = {
          x <- sort(unique(comparison[source == "individual" |
                                      source == "panel_individual"]))
          if (length(x) == 0) "None" else paste(x, collapse = " | ")
        },
        comp_F = {
          x <- sort(unique(comparison[!is.na(sex) & sex == "F"]))
          if (length(x) == 0) "None" else paste(x, collapse = " | ")
        },
        comp_M = {
          x <- sort(unique(comparison[!is.na(sex) & sex == "M"]))
          if (length(x) == 0) "None" else paste(x, collapse = " | ")
        },
        .groups = "drop"
      ) %>%
      inner_join(col_to_key, by = "SomaKey")

    ann_col <- tibble(colname = colnames(beta_mat)) %>%
      left_join(ann_src, by = "colname") %>%
      mutate(across(starts_with("comp_"), ~ replace_na(.x, "None"))) %>%
      column_to_rownames("colname") %>%
      as.data.frame() %>%
      select(comp_combined, comp_individual, comp_F, comp_M)
    drop_uniform <- function(df, cn) {
      if (cn %in% names(df) && length(unique(df[[cn]])) <= 1L) df[[cn]] <- NULL
      df
    }
    ann_col <- drop_uniform(ann_col, "comp_F")
    ann_col <- drop_uniform(ann_col, "comp_M")

    base_comp_colors <- c(
      "AD vs HC"            = "#0072B2",
      "MCI vs HC"           = "#CC79A7",
      "LBD vs HC"           = "#D55E00",
      "MCI-PD vs HC"        = "#009E73",
      "PD vs HC"            = "#B8860B",
      "AD_spectrum vs HC"   = "#1B4F8C",
      "LB_spectrum vs HC"   = "#8C2A00",
      "None"                = "grey90"
    )
    uniq_levels <- unique(unlist(lapply(ann_col, function(x)
      if (is.null(x)) character() else as.character(unique(x)))))
    level_colors <- setNames(base_comp_colors[uniq_levels], uniq_levels)
    level_colors[is.na(level_colors)] <- "grey80"
    ann_colors <- setNames(
      lapply(names(ann_col), function(cn) level_colors[unique(ann_col[[cn]])]),
      names(ann_col)
    )

    group_label <- if (adjust_for_group) "group-adjusted" else "no group adjustment"
    scale_label <- if (biomarker_scale == "log2") "log2 biomarker" else "raw biomarker"
    pheatmap(
      beta_mat, color = pal, breaks = bk,
      cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_cols = TRUE,
      annotation_col = if (ncol(ann_col) > 0) ann_col else NA,
      annotation_colors = ann_colors,
      labels_col = lbl_col, display_numbers = stars,
      number_color = "black", number_cex = 3,
      main = paste0(out_tag, " LMM (log2 protein ~ ", scale_label, "; ",
                    group_label, "; * q<", alpha_fdr, ")"),
      filename = paste0("heatmap_", out_tag, "_v2.pdf"),
      width = 8, height = 5
    )
  }
  disc_meta <- cand_tbl %>%
    group_by(SomaKey) %>%
    summarise(
      discovery   = paste(unique(paste0(source, ":", comparison)),
                          collapse = " | "),
      min_q_disc  = suppressWarnings(min(q_disc, na.rm = TRUE)),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(min_q_disc = if_else(is.infinite(min_q_disc), NA_real_, min_q_disc))

  assoc_tbl <- res_lmm %>%
    mutate(ci_low = beta - 1.96 * se,
           ci_high = beta + 1.96 * se) %>%
    left_join(disc_meta, by = "SomaKey") %>%
    select(ProteinLabel, EntrezGeneSymbol, SomaKey,
           discovery, min_q_disc,
           biomarker, biomarker_scale,
           beta, se, ci_low, ci_high,
           p, q, n_obs, n_subj,
           adjust_for_group, age_adjustment, model, model_formula) %>%
    arrange(q, desc(abs(beta)))
  write_csv(assoc_tbl,
            paste0("protein_biomarker_associations_", out_tag, "_v2.csv"))
  top_pairs <- assoc_tbl %>%
    filter(!is.na(q)) %>% arrange(q, desc(abs(beta))) %>% slice_head(n = n_top)

  plot_marginal <- function(df, somakey, prot_label, biomarker) {
    df_cc <- df %>%
      select(SubjectID, all_of(age_terms), Sex, group_individual,
             y = all_of(somakey), x = all_of(biomarker)) %>%
      filter(!is.na(y), !is.na(x), if_all(all_of(age_terms), ~ !is.na(.x)),
             !is.na(Sex), !is.na(SubjectID))
    if (adjust_for_group) {
      df_cc <- df_cc %>% filter(!is.na(group_individual))
    }
    if (biomarker_scale == "log2") {
      df_cc <- df_cc %>% filter(x > 0) %>% mutate(x_model = log2(x))
    } else {
      df_cc <- df_cc %>% mutate(x_model = x)
    }
    df_cc$Sex              <- droplevels(factor(df_cc$Sex))
    df_cc$group_individual <- droplevels(factor(df_cc$group_individual))

    fixed <- c("x_model", age_terms)
    include_sex <- nlevels(df_cc$Sex) >= 2
    include_group <- adjust_for_group && nlevels(df_cc$group_individual) >= 2
    if (include_sex) fixed <- c(fixed, "Sex")
    if (include_group) fixed <- c(fixed, "group_individual")
    has_rep <- any(table(df_cc$SubjectID) > 1)
    fml_txt <- paste("y ~", paste(fixed, collapse = " + "),
                     if (has_rep) "+ (1|SubjectID)" else "")
    fit <- if (has_rep) lmer(as.formula(fml_txt), data = df_cc, REML = FALSE)
           else         lm(as.formula(fml_txt), data = df_cc)

    grid <- tibble(
      x_model = seq(min(df_cc$x_model), max(df_cc$x_model), length.out = 100)
    )
    for (age_term in age_terms) {
      grid[[age_term]] <- mean(df_cc[[age_term]], na.rm = TRUE)
    }
    if (include_sex) {
      grid$Sex <- names(sort(table(df_cc$Sex), decreasing = TRUE))[1]
    }
    if (include_group) {
      grid$group_individual <- names(sort(table(df_cc$group_individual),
                                          decreasing = TRUE))[1]
    }
    if (has_rep) {
      grid$SubjectID <- df_cc$SubjectID[1]
      grid$pred      <- predict(fit, newdata = grid, re.form = NA)
    } else {
      grid$pred      <- predict(fit, newdata = grid)
    }

    est <- if (inherits(fit, "lmerMod")) broom.mixed::tidy(fit, effects = "fixed")
           else                          broom::tidy(fit)
    est <- est %>% filter(term == "x_model") %>% slice(1)

    x_axis_label <- if (biomarker_scale == "log2") {
      paste0(biomarker, " (log2)")
    } else {
      paste0(biomarker, " (raw)")
    }
    group_label <- if (adjust_for_group) "group-adjusted" else "no group adjustment"
    ggplot(df_cc, aes(x = x_model, y = y)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.25, size = 1.2) +
      geom_line(data = grid, aes(x = x_model, y = pred),
                linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.85, color = "#09637E") +
      theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
      labs(
        title = paste0(prot_label, " vs ", biomarker),
        subtitle = paste0("LMM (", group_label, "): β=", round(est$estimate, 3),
                          ", p=", signif(est$p.value, 3),
                          " | n_obs=", nrow(df_cc),
                          ", n_subj=", n_distinct(df_cc$SubjectID)),
        x = x_axis_label,
        y = paste0(prot_label, " (log2 RFU)")
      )
  }

  if (make_scatter && nrow(top_pairs) > 0L) {
    out_dir <- paste0("top_pair_plots_", out_tag, "_v2")
    dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(top_pairs))) {
      p <- plot_marginal(samp_tbl_bio,
                         top_pairs$SomaKey[i],
                         top_pairs$ProteinLabel[i],
                         top_pairs$biomarker[i])
      ggsave(file.path(out_dir,
                       paste0("scatter_", i, "_",
                              make.names(top_pairs$ProteinLabel[i]),
                              "_vs_", top_pairs$biomarker[i], ".png")),
             plot = p, width = 5.5, height = 4.5, dpi = 300)
    }
  }

  invisible(list(cand_tbl = cand_tbl,
                 res_lmm  = res_lmm,
                 assoc_tbl = assoc_tbl,
                 top_pairs = top_pairs))
}

format_sensitivity_comparison <- function(main_tbl,
                                          sensitivity_tbl,
                                          sensitivity_label) {
  if (is.null(sensitivity_tbl) || nrow(sensitivity_tbl) == 0L) return(tibble())

  main_comp <- main_tbl %>%
    select(ProteinLabel, EntrezGeneSymbol, SomaKey, biomarker,
           beta_main = beta, p_main = p, q_main = q,
           n_obs_main = n_obs, n_subj_main = n_subj,
           main_biomarker_scale = biomarker_scale,
           main_adjust_for_group = adjust_for_group,
           main_age_adjustment = age_adjustment)

  sens_comp <- sensitivity_tbl %>%
    select(SomaKey, biomarker,
           beta_sensitivity = beta, p_sensitivity = p, q_sensitivity = q,
           n_obs_sensitivity = n_obs, n_subj_sensitivity = n_subj,
           sensitivity_biomarker_scale = biomarker_scale,
           sensitivity_adjust_for_group = adjust_for_group,
           sensitivity_age_adjustment = age_adjustment)

  main_comp %>%
    inner_join(sens_comp, by = c("SomaKey", "biomarker")) %>%
    mutate(
      sensitivity = sensitivity_label,
      beta_delta = if_else(main_biomarker_scale == sensitivity_biomarker_scale,
                           beta_sensitivity - beta_main,
                           NA_real_),
      same_direction = sign(beta_main) == sign(beta_sensitivity),
      main_q_lt_0_10 = q_main < 0.10,
      sensitivity_q_lt_0_10 = q_sensitivity < 0.10,
      q_crosses_0_10 = main_q_lt_0_10 != sensitivity_q_lt_0_10
    ) %>%
    arrange(sensitivity, q_main, q_sensitivity, desc(abs(beta_main)))
}

write_sensitivity_comparisons <- function(out_tag,
                                          main_assoc,
                                          no_group_assoc = NULL,
                                          ab_ratio_raw_assoc = NULL) {
  comparisons <- bind_rows(
    format_sensitivity_comparison(main_assoc, no_group_assoc,
                                  "omit_group_individual"),
    format_sensitivity_comparison(main_assoc, ab_ratio_raw_assoc,
                                  "raw_PlasmaABRatio")
  )
  if (nrow(comparisons) > 0L) {
    write_csv(comparisons,
              paste0("protein_biomarker_associations_", out_tag,
                     "_sensitivity_compare_v2.csv"))
  }
  invisible(comparisons)
}
```

```{r run-bone}
if (isTRUE(get0("SKIP_RMD_PANEL_RUNS", ifnotfound = FALSE))) {
  message("Skipping bone panel run because SKIP_RMD_PANEL_RUNS is TRUE.")
} else {
panel_bone <- panel_hits %>% filter(panel == "bone")
bone_panel_somakeys <- unique(panel_bone$SomaKey)

cand_bone <- bind_rows(
  panel_bone,
  extract_candidates(dream_all, alpha_fdr = 0.10) %>%
    filter(SomaKey %in% bone_panel_somakeys)
) %>%
  distinct(SomaKey, comparison, source, .keep_all = TRUE)

message(sprintf("Bone discovery candidates: %d unique SomaKeys (%d rows).",
                n_distinct(cand_bone$SomaKey), nrow(cand_bone)))

bone_out <- run_panel(
  cand_tbl          = cand_bone,
  samp_tbl_bio      = samp_tbl_bio,
  bio               = BIO,
  protein_label_map = protein_label_map,
  out_tag           = "bone",
  alpha_fdr         = 0.10,
  n_top             = 8,
  adjust_for_group  = TRUE,
  age_terms         = AGE_TERMS,
  biomarker_scale   = "log2"
)

bone_no_group_out <- if (RUN_GROUP_SENSITIVITY) {
  run_panel(
    cand_tbl          = cand_bone,
    samp_tbl_bio      = samp_tbl_bio,
    bio               = BIO,
    protein_label_map = protein_label_map,
    out_tag           = "bone_no_group",
    alpha_fdr         = 0.10,
    n_top             = 0,
    adjust_for_group  = FALSE,
    age_terms         = AGE_TERMS,
    biomarker_scale   = "log2",
    make_heatmap      = TRUE,
    make_scatter      = FALSE
  )
} else NULL

bone_ab_ratio_raw_out <- if (RUN_AB_RATIO_RAW_SENSITIVITY) {
  run_panel(
    cand_tbl          = cand_bone,
    samp_tbl_bio      = samp_tbl_bio,
    bio               = "PlasmaABRatio",
    protein_label_map = protein_label_map,
    out_tag           = "bone_abratio_raw",
    alpha_fdr         = 0.10,
    n_top             = 0,
    adjust_for_group  = TRUE,
    age_terms         = AGE_TERMS,
    biomarker_scale   = "raw",
    make_heatmap      = FALSE,
    make_scatter      = FALSE
  )
} else NULL

bone_sensitivity_compare <- write_sensitivity_comparisons(
  out_tag            = "bone",
  main_assoc         = bone_out$assoc_tbl,
  no_group_assoc     = bone_no_group_out$assoc_tbl,
  ab_ratio_raw_assoc = bone_ab_ratio_raw_out$assoc_tbl
)
}
```

```{r run-senescence}
if (isTRUE(get0("SKIP_RMD_PANEL_RUNS", ifnotfound = FALSE))) {
  message("Skipping senescence panel run because SKIP_RMD_PANEL_RUNS is TRUE.")
} else {
panel_sen <- panel_hits %>% filter(panel == "senescence")
sen_panel_somakeys <- unique(panel_sen$SomaKey)

cand_sen <- bind_rows(
  panel_sen,
  extract_candidates(dream_all, alpha_fdr = 0.10) %>%
    filter(SomaKey %in% sen_panel_somakeys)
) %>%
  distinct(SomaKey, comparison, source, .keep_all = TRUE)

message(sprintf("Senescence discovery candidates: %d unique SomaKeys (%d rows).",
                n_distinct(cand_sen$SomaKey), nrow(cand_sen)))

senescence_out <- run_panel(
  cand_tbl          = cand_sen,
  samp_tbl_bio      = samp_tbl_bio,
  bio               = BIO,
  protein_label_map = protein_label_map,
  out_tag           = "senescence",
  alpha_fdr         = 0.10,
  n_top             = 8,
  adjust_for_group  = TRUE,
  age_terms         = AGE_TERMS,
  biomarker_scale   = "log2"
)

senescence_no_group_out <- if (RUN_GROUP_SENSITIVITY) {
  run_panel(
    cand_tbl          = cand_sen,
    samp_tbl_bio      = samp_tbl_bio,
    bio               = BIO,
    protein_label_map = protein_label_map,
    out_tag           = "senescence_no_group",
    alpha_fdr         = 0.10,
    n_top             = 0,
    adjust_for_group  = FALSE,
    age_terms         = AGE_TERMS,
    biomarker_scale   = "log2",
    make_heatmap      = TRUE,
    make_scatter      = FALSE
  )
} else NULL

senescence_ab_ratio_raw_out <- if (RUN_AB_RATIO_RAW_SENSITIVITY) {
  run_panel(
    cand_tbl          = cand_sen,
    samp_tbl_bio      = samp_tbl_bio,
    bio               = "PlasmaABRatio",
    protein_label_map = protein_label_map,
    out_tag           = "senescence_abratio_raw",
    alpha_fdr         = 0.10,
    n_top             = 0,
    adjust_for_group  = TRUE,
    age_terms         = AGE_TERMS,
    biomarker_scale   = "raw",
    make_heatmap      = FALSE,
    make_scatter      = FALSE
  )
} else NULL

senescence_sensitivity_compare <- write_sensitivity_comparisons(
  out_tag            = "senescence",
  main_assoc         = senescence_out$assoc_tbl,
  no_group_assoc     = senescence_no_group_out$assoc_tbl,
  ab_ratio_raw_assoc = senescence_ab_ratio_raw_out$assoc_tbl
)
}
```

```{r sessioninfo}
sessionInfo()
```
